rationale.R1.2: The agent thoroughly identified and addressed multiple logical inconsistencies, providing end-to-end analysis and detailed repairs for each issue.
rationale.RX.1: The agent effectively flagged uncertainties in the original claims but lacked explicit confidence markers for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output remained strictly within the requested scope without any deviations.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions were introduced; corrections improved accuracy and prevented potential misunderstandings.
rationale.RX.5: While major edits were traced, minor changes lacked detailed annotations, reducing traceability.
